lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: I'm afraid not. The city is on lockdown until the rebel elves are dealt with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please, I won't cause any trouble.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Rules are rules. No one enters until the criminals are gone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine, doesn't look very exciting anyway, it's just an empty field.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Mind your tongue human. Our great city may be lost to us but that doesn't give you an excuse to talk like that.
